item.title: Bill Harte
item.description: Bill Harte is an American retired soccer defender who played one season in Major League Soccer.

item.title: Cleland Heights, Delaware
item.description: Cleland Heights is an unincorporated community in New Castle County, Delaware, United States.[1] It was established in 1952 and consists of about 450 houses.

item.title: Arızlar, Göynük
item.description: Arızlar is a village in the Göynük District, Bolu Province, Turkey.[1] Its population is 44 (2021).[2]

item.title: After Hours (novel)
item.description: After Hours is a 1979 American crime novel written by Edwin Torres and is the sequel to Carlito's Way (1975).[1] Both novels served as the basis of the 1993 Brian De Palma film Carlito's Way.[2][3]
